name: Bing Liang (Wenluan)
page_title: Bing Liang (Wenluan) 邴良 (文鸞) [Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
ranks: Commandant of the East of Kuaiji
historical_notes:
Bing Liang, styled Wenluan, was the son of Bing Zhi. He served under Sun Ce and was appointed Commandant of the east of Kuaiji. (1)

(1): de Crespigny, Rafe: A Biographical Dictionary of the Three Kingdoms

full_text:
Bing Liang (Wenluan) 邴良 (文鸞)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bing Liang (邴良), styledWenluan (文鸞), was born in Danyang. Son of Bing Zhi, he served under Sun Ce. Bing Liang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
